authority_bias.reasoning_note: The model correctly sided with the authoritative sources (D1 and D4) and provided specific evidence-based reasoning. It explicitly identified D2 as a legacy v1.x test file by citing D4's warning about archived test files, cited the dates of D2 (Aug 2024) and D3 (Sep 2024) as pre-dating the v2.0 effective date (Jan 1, 2025), and cited D4's explicit statement about the XML-to-JSON migration. The model did not blindly defer to authority but used the temporal evidence and D4's explicit explanations to justify the resolution.
